headline: Home Depot (HD) Solves a Critical Customer Pain Point to Win over Shoppers
summary: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is one of the 10 Best Housing Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 22, The Street reported that The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) set up AI-powered phone agents to speed up customer service. The technology is built on Google Cloud’s Gemini Enterprise, which helps callers to skip menus and […]
